title: totem-highlight
description: this mod add a customable colors totem highlight
body:
This mod adds markers behind totems, making them easier to find in your inventory.
![without highlight mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a55c5ab7d7f298144fb8bcc2a11db8a298654cf7.png)

![with totem highlight mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/488285f10a7c70c0c046adaa5acd1a9078cf04e4.png)              
You can easily change the color,opacity and size
![settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3ad7798ef9f40883da77c9aca903591c8de76f8.png)
